governance: Every path below is enumerated explicitly. Wildcard-only rules are not used for parity or R2 vendoring.
transitional_sharing_model: Stage 2 defaults to verified copy + CI drift detection across repositories. Shared logic is authored once here; that is not the same as an ideal long-term distribution mechanism—submodule or internal package remains an explicit architectural follow-up.
manifest_note: The manifest hashes every path in governed_paths only (not itself). Regenerate with scripts/hash_shared_logic.py after any governed change.
